creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sry, I cannot reproduce this.
Even if I directly compile it, I do not see any problems.
As my local user (not root):
```
cd devel/rubygem-prometheus-client-mmap
make clean extract do-patch
make
```

I use the following /etc/make.conf, maybe you want to try it with this:
```
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=mysql=10.5m ssl=openssl samba=4.13 java=11

OPTIONS_UNSET=DEBUG DOCBOOK EXAMPLES
OPTIONS_SET=proxy dav ssl ldap

DISABLE_LICENSES=yes

DEVELOPER=1
PATCH_CONTINUE_ON_FAIL=1
```
